creator: gja822@narod.ru
text:
(In reply to Charlie Li from comment #1)
Options are default:
===> The following configuration options are available for gtk3-3.24.34:
     ATK_BRIDGE=on: AT-SPI ATK bridge support (requires X11)
     BROADWAY=on: Enable GDK Broadway backend for showing GTK+ in the webbrowser using HTML5 and web sockets.
     COLORD=on: Color profile support
     CUPS=on: CUPS printing system support
     DEBUG=off: Build with debugging support
     WAYLAND=on: GDK Wayland backend
     X11=on: GDK X11 backend
===> Use 'make config' to modify these settings

ports' tree was up-to date via 'portsnap fetch update' yesterday
today the problem vanished after new 'portsnap fetch update'
